topic: Nuclear fusion commercialization outlook and strategic implications
objective: To assess the commercial viability and strategic implications of nuclear fusion energy, focusing on timeline, cost competitiveness, and key players.
decision_question: Should we invest in or prepare for nuclear fusion as a commercially viable energy source within the next 15 years?

[Source 5: DOE Fusion Innovation Research Engine selectees] Department of Energy (DOE) today announced $107 million in funding for six projects in the Fusion Innovative Research Engine (FIRE) Collaboratives , and that several privately funded fusion companies have completed early critical-path science and technology (S&T) milestones in the Milestone-Based Fusion Development Program (“the Milestone Program”).

[Source 5: DOE Fusion Innovation Research Engine selectees] The DOE Milestone-Based Fusion Development Program was first authorized in the Energy Act of 2020 and received its first funding appropriation in fiscal year 2022.
